title: Vision — Knowledge & Prompt Management for AI (for everyone)
verdict_summary: Pattern-source / north-star vision narrative. Contains NO formal requirement ids (no FR-*/NFR-*/A-*/AD-*/D-*/OQ-*) and no discrete un-id'd build MUSTs. Its 'non-negotiable' statements (understanding-before-use, personalisation-before-catalogue, one-tap-to-any-AI) are strategic UX principles, not buildable units. All concrete build obligations are explicitly delegated to the two referenced pages: the Product Brief (WA9A1sEol7) and the Phase 1 build spec (eO3CSNGaoU). Every surface it names — the four screens (onboarding -> personalised home/discover -> builder -> use/share), generate-by-selection, five-AI export (ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Custom GPT/Gemini Gem), learn-from-misses paste loop, and the near-term MCP servers — is already covered by existing stories and the orvex-studio-mcp repo. Zero build gaps.

components.name: Four P1 screens: onboarding -> personalised home -> builder -> use/share
components.quote: Phase 1 delivers four screens (onboarding → personalised home → builder → use/share) and 10–25 founder-curated starter skills for a single locked vertical

components.name: Personalised curated shelf (DISCOVER)
components.quote: DISCOVER — a personalised shelf of curated, trusted skills for your profession. Not a catalogue dump

components.name: Skill viewer showing labelled parts (UNDERSTAND)
components.quote: UNDERSTAND — every skill is shown as clear, labelled pieces (sections and items) you can read before trusting it

components.name: Plain-language personalisation layer over curated base (MAKE YOURS)
components.quote: MAKE YOURS — add your voice, your rules, your company knowledge... Your additions layer on top of the curated base; the base can always be restored

components.name: Rendered-prompt copy + one vendor export (USE IN ANY AI)
components.quote: USE IN ANY AI — copy the rendered prompt into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any assistant. Or push via one vendor export (Custom GPT / Gemini Gem)

components.name: Learn-from-misses paste loop with one-tap fix (LEARN FROM MISSES)
components.quote: LEARN FROM MISSES — paste a bad output back in, describe what went wrong in plain language, and Studio proposes a targeted fix. One tap applies it

components.name: Generate-by-selection default + sanctioned wizard entry
components.quote: Generate-by-selection, not unguided free-form, is the default entry... A wizard-driven, task-first prompt builder is a sanctioned alternative entry

components.name: Orvex MCP servers (near-term roadmap)
components.quote: Orvex MCP servers sit inside AI tools — Claude, Cursor, and others. Push skills in from Orvex; pull missed outputs back out for the tuning loop
